title: clerodendrum roseiflorum
intro: Clerodendrum roseiflorum, also known as the Rose Flowering Glory Bower, is a flowering plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clerodendrum roseiflorum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune function. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are traditionally used to treat various health conditions.
